creator: brix@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately, I can not accept the OTR patch for the "official"
irc/bitlbee port, since that patch is not likely to be accepted by the
bitlbee developers (it's not really a branch, so far it's more like a
fork).

However, miwi has expressed interest in maintaining a seperate
irc/bitlbee-otr port, so I will assign this PR to him.

Regarding the added OPTIONS -- I'll look into adding something similar
in the next update of irc/bitlbee.

Thank you for submitting this.

-- 
Henrik Brix Andersen <brix@FreeBSD.org>
